browser.description: Browser automation for web interaction (navigate, click, type, scroll, iframes, hold-click) with web search for finding URLs

code_execution.description: Run Python scripts that call tools programmatically (reduces LLM round trips)

file.description: File manipulation tools: read, write, patch (with fuzzy matching), and search (content + files)

hermes-cli.description: Full interactive CLI toolset - all default tools plus cronjob management

hermes-email.description: Email bot toolset - interact with Hermes via email (IMAP/SMTP)

hermes-gateway.description: Gateway toolset - union of all messaging platform tools

hermes-homeassistant.description: Home Assistant bot toolset - smart home event monitoring and control

hermes-webhook.description: Webhook toolset - receive and process external webhook events

hermes-wecom-callback.description: WeCom callback toolset - enterprise self-built app messaging (full access)

hermes-whatsapp.description: WhatsApp bot toolset - similar to Telegram (personal messaging, more trusted)

homeassistant.description: Home Assistant smart home control and monitoring

memory.description: Persistent memory across sessions (personal notes + user profile)

session_search.description: Search and recall past conversations with summarization

web.description: Web research and content extraction tools
